financial_metrics.title: Financial Metrics
financial_metrics.label: Excellent
bullets: The company is making more money and spending wisely, which is a good sign.
They are investing in new products and paying off debts, which helps them grow stronger.

risk_intelligence.title: Risk Intelligence
risk_intelligence.label: Well Managed
bullets: The company is doing a good job managing risks, but global issues like supply chain problems and currency changes could still cause trouble.
There are concerns about government actions affecting prices, and the company hasn't shared how they plan to handle these challenges.

esg.title: ESG Analysis
esg.label: Good
bullets: The company is doing a great job taking care of the environment.
They also perform well in treating people fairly and supporting communities.

capital_structure.title: Capital Structure
capital_structure.label: Well Managed
bullets: The company is in a strong financial position because it manages its debts well and has enough money to cover its needs.
It invests a lot in new ideas and research, which helps it grow while keeping its finances stable.

management_discussion.title: Management Discussion
management_discussion.label: Excellent
bullets: The company is doing well overall, with strong sales and profits, but could share more detailed future plans.
Management explains their goals clearly, but they could provide more specific financial targets and timelines.

strategy.title: Strategy Overview
strategy.label: Excellent
bullets: Sun Pharma has a clear plan to grow by focusing on specialty products and expanding internationally.
They are doing well with their plans, but challenges like cybersecurity and pricing in some areas could affect future growth.

investment_synthesis.title: Investment Synthesis
investment_synthesis.label: Good
bullets: Sun Pharma is doing well because it focuses on unique products and invests a lot in research to stay ahead.
Even though there are challenges like pricing and regulations, the company is strong and has a good plan for growth.
